steps.title: Identify what the passage emphasizes
steps.content: The passage builds toward a specific comparison: of the three films credited to Carlos, Tron is the one in which audiences can hear the most of her original compositions. That comparative point is the main idea the answer must capture.

steps.title: Eliminate each wrong choice and confirm the answer
steps.content:
Test all four choices against the passage's main point:
  • Choice A — Of the three films for which Carlos is credited, Tron features the most original music from her.: directly restates the passage's central comparison. ✓
  • Choice B — The director of The Shining used most of the music that Carlos composed for it.: reverses the passage's facts; the passage says much of Carlos's score for The Shining was unused. ✗
  • Choice C — Beethoven is widely considered to be a more important composer than Carlos.: introduces an unsupported evaluative claim not made in the passage. ✗
  • Choice D — Carlos is a notable innovator among film composers in the 1970s and 1980s.: emphasizes a peripheral detail rather than the passage's central film-by-film comparison. ✗
A is correct.
